description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two main components: a large, black, rectangular speaker cabinet and a smaller, rustic wooden crate marked 'Fragile' on its yellow top. The speaker cabinet features prominent circular speaker grilles on the front, with visible mesh patterns and a smaller tweeter above the main woofer. The cabinet is adorned with various colorful stickers and has sturdy metal handles on its sides for transport. The wooden crate, constructed from weathered planks, has slatted sides and a partially open front, suggesting it may be used for storage or as a prop. Both objects show signs of wear and urban use, making them suitable for street or garage environments.
description: A large, sticker-covered black speaker cabinet with metal mesh grilles stands beside a weathered wooden crate labeled 'Fragile'. The set exudes an urban, well-used vibe.
description_view_0: The front of the speaker cabinet displays two circular speaker grilles, while the wooden crate's slatted side and 'Fragile' label on top are visible.
description_view_1: The side of the speaker cabinet shows a metal handle and more stickers, with the crate's open slatted side and yellow top in front.
description_view_2: The opposite front of the speaker cabinet reveals a different grille design and a horn tweeter, while the crate's other slatted side and 'Fragile' label are visible.
description_view_3: The other side of the speaker cabinet features another handle and a large 'KISS' sticker, with the crate's closed side and yellow top in view.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles feature a circular, perforated metal mesh pattern with a fine grid texture, surrounded by a metallic rim. One side has a larger woofer grille and a smaller tweeter grille, while the other has a horn tweeter above the main grille.
